27002.text: Analysis paralysis is the real threat, not the market — a dozen repeated reflections produced zero meter movement while the single act of running the file did; the fix is to act on the first pass, not the fifteenth.

Two near-deaths at 240/720 came from selling 100% of food — the survival buffer isn't a strategy choice, it's the fixed cost of admission to keep out-earning anyone; reserve it before every surplus sale, no exceptions for good prices.
